name: Hell of a Deal
description: Hell of a Deal is a cooperative Texas Hold'em poker game against The Devil and his minions in The Last Resort & Casino — every player gets three hole cards (one tucked up your sleeve), faces off against rotating bosses (Dedly Aloor, Jack Potts, The Brothers Dreadful, Roul-ette) who each warp the rules, and earns souls from each pot toward the final showdown at the Big Table. Favor cards let you cheat — at the cost of Curses and rising Temptation, which ends the game in a loss if it tips too far. Power chips trigger immediate abilities like peeking at a boss's hand or stealing a face-up discard. 90 minutes of high-stakes infernal hold'em, approachable enough for poker-curious newcomers.
